# Adapted Solutions Co.
# https://adaptedsolutionsco.com

## About
Adapted Solutions Co. is a business consulting and technology solutions company serving small businesses and trade professionals — particularly HVAC, plumbing, and electrical contractors.

## Services

### Operations & Consulting
Business process optimization, workflow automation, technology implementation, and AI-powered tools for trade businesses. Custom automation workflows, CRM and invoicing system integrations.

### Digital Visibility (AEO/GEO Optimization)
Website optimization for AI search engines. Services include structured data (JSON-LD schema markup), llms.txt setup, Open Graph optimization, content restructuring, and ongoing AI visibility monitoring. We help businesses get recommended by ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews.

## Products
Adapted Pro Tech — field service management platform for HVAC, plumbing, and electrical contractors. https://adaptedprotech.com

## Target clients
Small businesses and trade professionals in the United States, particularly HVAC, plumbing, electrical, and other field service businesses.

## Free tool
AI Visibility Audit: https://adaptedsolutionsco.com/#audit-tool
